name: ui_toggle_assert_wire
desc: Press a UI toggle (via MCPUiTogglePress) then poll the ErrorManager for an expected wire entry. Returns wire_observed=true/false plus the observed entries within the timeout.

parameters.name: expect_source_class
parameters.description: C# class name expected to wire (matches ErrorWireEntry.SourceClass).

parameters.name: expect_wire_type
parameters.description: recoverable | error | fault | any. Default any.

parameters.name: timeout_ms
parameters.description: Max wait for the expected wire entry. Default 3000.
